decisions.rationale: IR re-read confirms ai_RNbBHXRK (text column) and ai_RNbBHXRM (mode-badge wrapper) are intermediate Group_transparent_ nodes in decompose ui_refs[], but AC-1 explicitly requires data-bubble-id only on greeting-top (ai_RNbBHXRH), avatar (ai_RNbBHXRI), name (ai_RNbBHXRL), mode-pill (ai_RNbBHXRN), and coaching-note (ai_RNbBHXRO). DOM nesting preserves IR hierarchy — leaf elements carry markers and correct parent-child structure — so criteria_audit AC-1 passes. ui_evidence is partial solely for parity selectors on the two anonymous wrappers; adding markers is a two-line tooling polish item, not a rewrite blocker, and no downstream item in depends_on requires these intermediate anchors.

AC-2 requires bTIVQ to render ai_coaching_mode_os options from ENUM-03; AI_COACHING_MODE_ORDER exposes all five slugs including simplifier, satisfying the AC literal. Bubble bTIVQ data_source filters simplifier from selectable rows (simplifier is only injected via bTIVe empty-reset), which is a workflow-parity nuance beyond AC-2 wording. FV-2 passes: non-empty selection persists via updateCoachingModePreference and profile refresh. Filtering simplifier from SelectItem while retaining simplifier fallback in the API is valid backlog polish; it does not block DASH-03+ depends_on gates.

Critique alternative explicitly endorses accepting this as intentional brownfield simplification. Radix Select cannot clear to an empty value, so the bTIVe empty-selection branch in coachingModeApi is defensive parity code unreachable from the current UI — not an AC-2 violation. The active add-mode path (bTIVc) is wired and tested via handleCoachingModeChange; no downstream item depends on Bubble clear-to-simplifier semantics in this wave.

FV-1 and AC-1 pass: ai_RNbBHXRO is present and binds pressureProfile from useDashboardUserContext when available. The static placeholder ('Your dashboard is ready to be personalized.') when pressureProfile is absent is brownfield empty-state UX not specified in AC-1 or FV-1; Bubble binds pressure_profile_text without a generic fallback. Hiding the coaching-note region until results.pressure_profile is available is low-priority data-binding polish that does not affect greeting card mount, coaching dropdown, or quick-action routing for downstream DASH-03+.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 intermediate ui_ref markers (ai_RNbBHXRK, ai_RNbBHXRM) as parity-tooling polish within DASH-02 scope; C-2 simplifier dropdown filter as Bubble workflow nuance beyond ENUM-03 AC wording; C-4 coaching-note hide-until-data vs placeholder fallback. Accepted: C-3 bTIVe empty-reset unreachable under Radix Select as intentional brownfield simplification.
